name: keyman-status
description: Report on status of Keyman projects

scripts.build: npm ci && npm run-script prebuild && npm run-script build-server && npm run-script build-client && npm run-script postbuild
scripts.build-client: cd public && npm ci && npm run-script build
scripts.build-server: cd server && npm ci && npm run-script build
scripts.log: az webapp log tail --resource-group keyman --name com-keyman-status

author: Marc Durdin
